---
title: "Task -01"
output: word_document
date: "2026-05-11"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#Dataset 
```{r}
data=read.csv("C:\\Users\\DAMAN\\Downloads\\adutls.csv")
View(data)
```
#gender distribution

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(data, aes(x = gender, fill = gender)) +
  geom_bar(width = 0.6) +
  labs(title = "Gender Distribution",
       x = "Gender",
       y = "Count") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#6A5ACD", "#FF69B4")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```
#histogram for age 

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(data, aes(x = age)) +
  geom_histogram(
    aes(y = ..density..),
    binwidth = 5,
    fill = "#6A5ACD",
    color = "white",
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_density(
    color = "#FF6B6B",
    linewidth = 1.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Age Distribution of Population",
    subtitle = "Histogram with Density Curve",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 18
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 12
    ),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
